title: Gritt raises $32M for AI robots that bolt onto existing construction equipment to build solar farms faster
summary: Gritt raised $32M for AI robots that attach to existing construction equipment and place solar panels up to four times faster than manual crews. The timing aligns with a demographic cliff in construction.
caption: output/2026-07-21/gritt-raises-32m-for-ai-robots-that-bolt-onto-existing-construction-eq.txt
